subject: Action needed: apollo planning in Christchurch | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-2093
body: Please note the apollo stream in Christchurch has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-2093. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: coordination, coffee.
